channel.title: Terraform-Patterns on Mike Ball
channel.description: Recent content in Terraform-Patterns on Mike Ball

item.title: Verifying and validating Terraform: techniques for testing infrastructure-as-code
item.description: An overview of techniques for testing Terraform, from linting to end-to-end testing.

item.title: Terraform Patterns: the wrapper module
item.description: An overview of the Terraform wrapper module pattern.

item.title: Scalable Terraform Patterns: Reuse and Repeatability
item.description: An overview of native Terraform constructs enabling reuse and repeatability.

item.title: Scalable Terraform patterns: compound workspace names
item.description: My overview of the Terraform compound workspace name pattern.
